raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Mount Tamalpais College provides a high quality and inclusive Associate of Arts degree program and College Preparatory program to individuals incarcerated at the San Quentin Rehabilitation Center.",
    "The program at Mount Tamalpais College is free of charge.",
    "Mount Tamalpais College aims to expand access to quality higher education for incarcerated people.",
    "Participants in correctional education programs have approximately 43 percent lower odds of returning to prison than those who do not.",
    "Every dollar spent on prison education saves four to five dollars on the costs of re-incarceration.",
    "Mount Tamalpais College achieved full accreditation from the Accrediting Commission for Community and Junior Colleges in 2022.",
    "Mount Tamalpais College is the first fully accredited, independent college based inside a U.S. prison."
  ]
}
```
